name: edu-manager-v2
description: Education Center Management System - Vercel Edition

scripts.build: prisma generate && cd frontend && npm run build
scripts.test:unit: tsx --test tests/api-utils.test.ts tests/rate-limit.test.ts tests/observability.test.ts tests/router-audit.test.ts tests/import-students.test.ts tests/phase-c-ops.test.ts tests/pdf.test.ts tests/template-render-contract.test.ts tests/strict-class-line-ledger.test.ts tests/enrollment-period.test.ts tests/production-contracts.test.ts tests/report-bi.test.ts tests/student-progress-api.test.ts tests/student-progress-daily-api.test.ts tests/student-progress-daily-rollup.test.ts tests/student-progress-report.test.ts tests/tuition.test.ts tests/finance-corrections.test.ts tests/api-docs.test.ts tests/ux-motion.test.ts tests/attendance-regressions.test.ts tests/attendance-lock-transaction.test.ts
